nativePolicy: A visible label wraps one native progress element; omitting value creates native indeterminate semantics.
Determinate values are finite and bounded by a positive maximum; visible and aria-valuetext formatting share one localized string.
Role, generic accessible-name props, and aria value overrides are rejected at type and runtime boundaries because the visible label and native progress model own them.
Indeterminate motion is optional decoration and disappears under reduced motion.
showValue=false removes the visible localized value, aria-valuetext, and formatter work without changing native progress semantics.
